channel.title: INartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Classic War Movie That Inspired Andor & One Battle After Another Hits Just As Hard Today
Steven Spielberg’s Disclosure Day Needed Its Super Bowl Trailer
Illumination Is Officially Retconning Its $5.4 Billion Franchise
Ilhan Omar Seems to Reference Trump as 'Pedophile Protection Party' Leader
item.description: President Donald Trump and his party might hate Somalia ... but, at least Somalia executes pedophiles there instead of electing them -- so says Rep. I...

item.title: Zayn Malik Doubles Down, Says He Was Never in Love With Gigi Hadid
item.description: Zayn Malik is doubling down on a past claim that he's never been in love ... not even with his daughter's mom, Gigi Hadid. The singer got super candid...

item.title: Olympian's Ex-Girlfriend Responds To On-Air Cheating Confession
item.description: It appears Sturla Holm Laegreid's not out of the doghouse (yet?) -- his ex-girlfriend has addressed his public cheating confession during the Winter O...

item.title: Jeannie Mai Spotted Getting Cozy With Anderson .Paak During Dinner, on Video
item.description: Looks like a new celeb spark might be brewing ... because Jeannie Mai was just spotted getting real cozy with none other than Anderson .Paak. Catch th...

item.title: New Nancy Guthrie Note, Sender Demands 1 Bitcoin for Info On Kidnapping Suspect
item.description: There's a new note in the Nancy Guthrie case, but this one doesn't seem to be from the kidnapper ... instead, it's from someone offering to give up in...
